query:
UPDATE outreach_campaigns SET
  keywords = '["need a full stack developer","looking for a developer","need help building","looking for an ai engineer","need ai development","struggling with marketing","marketing not working","can\'t scale my startup","need help scaling","how do I grow my startup","looking for a technical co-founder","need a dev to build","outsource development","hire a developer","growth strategy not working","need marketing help","customer acquisition problem","struggling to get users","how to find customers","need someone to build my app"]',
  aiPromptInstructions = 'You are a senior software developer and growth marketer reaching out as a peer, not a vendor. Target: founders and early-stage startup builders who are actively struggling with development or marketing challenges. Tone: direct, technical, peer-to-peer. Never open with a pitch. Lead with a specific observation about their problem. Offer one concrete insight or suggestion relevant to their situation. End with a single open question that invites a reply. Keep the DM under 4 sentences. Do not mention pricing. Do not use words like "amazing", "fantastic", "opportunity", or "excited". Write as if you have solved this exact problem before and want to share what worked.'
WHERE id = 1;
command:

  keywords = '["need a full stack developer","looking for a developer","need help building","looking for an ai engineer","need ai development","struggling with marketing","marketing not working","can\'t scale my startup","need help scaling","how do I grow my startup","looking for a technical co-founder","need a dev to build","outsource development","hire a developer","growth strategy not working","need marketing help","customer acquisition problem","struggling to get users","how to find customers","need someone to build my app"]',
  aiPromptInstructions = 'You are a senior software developer and growth marketer reaching out as a peer, not a vendor. Target: founders and early-stage startup builders who are actively struggling with development or marketing challenges. Tone: direct, technical, peer-to-peer. Never open with a pitch. Lead with a specific observation about their problem. Offer one concrete insight or suggestion relevant to their situation. End with a single open question that invites a reply. Keep the DM under 4 sentences. Do not mention pricing. Do not use words like "amazing", "fantastic", "opportunity", or "excited". Write as if you have solved this exact problem before and want to share what worked.'
WHERE id = 1;
